rationale: TASK-067 acceptance is met: Control Room top-level nav is limited to Status/Product/System/Board/Graph; Status replaces Home with compact metrics; Product reads product Markdown through curated cards; System reads `.codewiki/kb/system/diagrams/**` YAML catalog and renders selectable diagram specs; Board/Graph focus on roadmap work and generated relationships; Pi status panel mirrors the simplified model and hides Diff from the tab cycle; UI state remains API/read-model backed; checks pass.

issues.summary: Unrelated TASK-068 is open in verification state; TASK-067 changes did not close or modify it intentionally.
